title: Phishing email opened
description: User opened a phishing email and clicked a malicious link which initiated the initial contact.

title: Malicious payload downloaded
description: A payload was downloaded and executed in the user's browser sandbox (simulated).

title: Local reconnaissance
description: Script enumerated browser version and basic firewall state. Minimal data collected for demonstration.

title: Report generated and displayed
description: An educational report view was generated explaining the vulnerability and how to remediate it.
